name: Ocean Breeze Anarkali Kurta
description: Light aqua georgette Anarkali with delicate silver gota work. Flowy floor-length silhouette perfect for beach weddings and seaside celebrations. Breathable, breezy fabric that moves gracefully in coastal winds.

name: Sunset Peach Anarkali Set
description: Soft peach chiffon Anarkali with golden zari border. Semi-sheer layers create an ethereal look for outdoor evening events. Lightweight and romantic with a flattering empire waist.

name: Ivory Festive Anarkali
description: Classic ivory cotton-silk Anarkali with mirror work yoke. Traditional yet airy — ideal for mehendi ceremonies and daytime festive gatherings. Comfortable A-line flare with side slits.

name: Emerald Garden Anarkali
description: Rich emerald green rayon Anarkali with floral block print. Earthy jewel tone for garden parties and festive brunches. Soft drape with three-quarter sleeves.

name: Blush Pink Party Anarkali
description: Blush pink net Anarkali with sequin embellishment on bodice. Glamorous yet lightweight for cocktail receptions. Layered kalis create dramatic movement.

name: Terracotta Block Print Anarkali
description: Warm terracotta cotton Anarkali with Rajasthani block print. Earthy, rustic aesthetic for casual festive wear. Breathable handloom cotton with mandarin collar.

name: Mustard Festive Anarkali
description: Mustard yellow viscose Anarkali with contrast piping. Vibrant traditional hue for haldi and mehendi functions. Flowy kalis with comfortable round neck.

name: White Cotton Office Kurta
description: Crisp white pure cotton straight kurta with minimal embroidery. Professional and breathable for daily office wear in hot climates. Clean lines, knee-length cut, side pockets.

name: Sky Blue Linen Kurta
description: Sky blue linen-blend straight kurta with subtle thread work. Cool and comfortable for summer office days. Relaxed fit with mandarin collar and button placket.

name: Beige Formal Kurta
description: Neutral beige cotton straight kurta with fine pintuck detail. Versatile office staple that pairs with palazzos or trousers. Lightweight woven cotton.

name: Sage Green Cotton Kurta
description: Sage green handloom cotton straight kurta. Earthy tone for casual office Fridays. Straight cut with three-quarter sleeves and band collar.

name: Navy Blue Work Kurta
description: Deep navy cotton straight kurta with white contrast buttons. Smart casual office wear. Structured cotton with clean finishing.

name: Dusty Rose Office Kurta
description: Dusty rose modal straight kurta with delicate lace trim on neckline. Feminine yet professional. Soft drape, wrinkle-resistant fabric.

name: Charcoal Grey Cotton Kurta
description: Charcoal grey breathable cotton straight kurta. Under budget daily wear essential. Simple round neck, straight hem, easy care fabric.

name: Mint Green Palazzo Set
description: Mint green rayon kurta with matching wide-leg palazzo pants. Fresh and breezy for summer weddings. Kurta features delicate thread embroidery on yoke.

name: Coral Festive Palazzo Set
description: Vibrant coral georgette kurta-palazzo co-ord with gold foil print. Festive yet comfortable for sangeet nights. Flowy palazzo with elastic waistband.

name: Lavender Dream Palazzo Set
description: Soft lavender chiffon kurta with palazzo and dupatta. Romantic pastel palette for daytime celebrations. Sheer dupatta with lace border.

name: Olive Earth Tone Palazzo Set
description: Olive green cotton kurta with printed palazzo pants. Earthy tones for nature-inspired festive looks. Block print palazzo with solid kurta.

name: Teal Party Palazzo Set
description: Teal blue crepe kurta with sharara-style palazzo. Bold colour for evening parties. Embellished neckline with sequin detail.

name: Rust Brown Palazzo Set
description: Warm rust brown cotton-silk kurta with palazzo. Rich earthy tone for autumn weddings. Minimal gold thread work on cuffs.

name: Golden Mehendi Sharara Set
description: Golden yellow georgette kurta with flared sharara pants. Traditional mehendi outfit with gota patti work. Wide sharara with can-can for volume and drama.

name: Maroon Wedding Sharara Set
description: Deep maroon velvet-touch kurta with sharara and dupatta. Regal wedding guest ensemble. Heavy zari embroidery on kurta and dupatta border.

name: Pink Festive Sharara Set
description: Hot pink net kurta with gold sharara pants. Bold festive statement for sangeet and mehendi. Mirror work on kurta bodice.

name: Mehendi Green Sharara Set
description: Mehendi green cotton kurta with printed sharara. Classic traditional look for pre-wedding rituals. Comfortable cotton with festive mirror accents.

name: Peach Embroidered Sharara Set
description: Peach organza kurta with embroidered sharara pants. Delicate and feminine for daytime wedding functions. Thread and sequin embroidery throughout.

name: White Beach Co-ord Set
description: All-white cotton co-ord with crop top and wide pants. Minimal resort-wear aesthetic for beach weddings. Crisp cotton with crochet detail on top.

name: Sand Beige Co-ord Set
description: Sand beige linen co-ord with short kurta and culottes. Neutral earthy palette for coastal celebrations. Relaxed resort silhouette.

name: Sky Blue Co-ord Set
description: Sky blue cotton co-ord with embroidered kurta and pants. Breezy coordinated look for summer events. Light embroidery on kurta hem.

name: Terracotta Co-ord Set
description: Terracotta cotton co-ord with kurta and straight pants. Warm earthy tone for festive brunches. Hand block print on pants.

name: Sage Co-ord Set
description: Sage green modal co-ord with long kurta and palazzo-style pants. Soft earthy green for garden parties. Minimal gold buttons on kurta.

name: Banarasi Silk Saree Red
description: Rich red Banarasi silk saree with gold zari weave. Traditional wedding guest saree with heavy pallu. Luxurious drape for formal ceremonies.

name: Chiffon Saree Peach
description: Peach chiffon saree with sequin border. Lightweight and elegant for evening receptions. Pre-stitched pleats option, flowy fabric.

name: Cotton Saree White Gold
description: White cotton saree with gold zari border. Classic festive saree for puja and religious ceremonies. Breathable handloom cotton.

name: Georgette Saree Emerald
description: Emerald green georgette saree with silver booti print. Jewel tone for cocktail parties. Pre-pleated with attached blouse piece.

name: Linen Saree Beige
description: Natural beige linen saree with minimal border. Earthy understated elegance for daytime events. Crisp linen with subtle sheen.

name: Organza Saree Lavender
description: Lavender organza saree with floral embroidery. Romantic pastel for spring weddings. Sheer lightweight fabric with satin blouse.

name: Silk Saree Mustard
description: Mustard yellow raw silk saree with temple border. Traditional South Indian inspired festive saree. Rich texture with contrast blouse.

name: Yellow Mehendi Dupatta Set
description: Bright yellow kurta with contrasting sharara and net dupatta. Complete mehendi look with gota work dupatta. Traditional festive ensemble.

name: Pink Wedding Dupatta Set
description: Blush pink kurta with palazzo and heavy embroidered dupatta. Wedding guest ready with statement dupatta. Zari and sequin dupatta border.

name: Green Festive Dupatta Set
description: Bottle green velvet kurta with gold dupatta and pants. Rich festive look for Diwali and weddings. Velvet kurta with brocade dupatta.

name: Blue Party Dupatta Set
description: Royal blue georgette kurta with sequin dupatta. Glamorous party wear with shimmer dupatta. Kurta with stone work neckline.

name: Orange Haldi Dupatta Set
description: Vibrant orange cotton kurta with yellow dupatta. Perfect haldi ceremony outfit. Bright cheerful colours with minimal embroidery.

name: White Eid Dupatta Set
description: Ivory white chikankari kurta with organza dupatta. Elegant understated festive wear. Lucknowi chikankari work on kurta.

name: Red Karva Chauth Dupatta Set
description: Classic red kurta with gold dupatta and churidar pants. Traditional karva chauth and festive ensemble. Heavy dupatta with tassels.

name: Purple Evening Dupatta Set
description: Deep purple crepe kurta with net dupatta and pants. Sophisticated evening festive look. Stone and pearl work on kurta.

name: Seafoam Beach Anarkali
description: Seafoam green lightweight georgette Anarkali. Coastal wedding perfect — breezy, flowy, and photogenic. Sheer overlay with solid lining.

name: Brown Earthy Palazzo Set
description: Chocolate brown cotton kurta with tan palazzo. Deep earthy tones for autumn festive events. Natural dye inspired colour palette.

name: Khaki Office Kurta Set
description: Khaki cotton kurta with matching pants. Under budget office wear co-ord. Wrinkle-free cotton blend, professional look.

name: Cream Daily Cotton Kurta
description: Cream off-white daily wear cotton kurta. Budget-friendly office essential under 1200. Soft breathable cotton, straight cut.

name: Turquoise Resort Co-ord
description: Turquoise blue resort co-ord with crop kurta and pants. Beach vacation and wedding guest wear. Tropical vibe with tassel detail.
